footer.dataAttribution: Data: EIPA / UDT Poland (charging infrastructure), OpenEV Data (electric vehicles).

home.title: EV Data Platform
home.description: Search normalized EV models and Polish charging infrastructure with source attribution, import freshness, and simple filters.
home.setupMessage: Database is not configured yet. Copy .env.example to .env and run prisma db push.
home.evCatalogDescription: Search brands and models, then open detail pages for battery, range, charging, source, and freshness.
home.stationSearchDescription: Filter stations by location, connector, minimum power, and operator using imported EIPA data.
home.stationMapDescription: View grouped Polish charging stations with province, connector, and minimum-power filters.
home.connectorKnowledgeDescription: Review CCS2, Type 2, CHAdeMO, and unknown connector records with AC/DC context and typical power ranges.
home.chargingInsightsDescription: See top operators, connector distribution, strongest stations, and province coverage from imported station data.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.descriptionWithCount: Browse {count} electric vehicles in our database.
vehicles.descriptionError: Browse electric vehicles after the catalog import is configured.
vehicles.setupRequiredMessage: EV catalog data is not available yet. Configure the database and run the OpenEV import.
vehicles.noResultsBody: Try a broader brand or model search.

vehiclesError.title: Vehicles could not load
vehiclesError.body: The EV catalog is temporarily unavailable. Try again, or check that the OpenEV import has completed.

vehicleDetailError.title: Vehicle details could not load
vehicleDetailError.body: This vehicle page is temporarily unavailable. Try again or return to the catalog.

stations.title: Charging Stations
stations.description: Search Polish charging infrastructure by place, connector, power, and operator.
stations.setupRequiredMessage: Charging station data is not available yet. Configure the database and run the EIPA import.
stations.noResultsBody: Try removing one filter or searching for a broader city, operator, or connector.

stationDetailError.title: Station details unavailable
stationDetailError.body: The station detail record could not be loaded. Try again, or return to the station search.

stationQuality.daysOld: {count, plural, one {# day old} other {# days old}}

map.title: Charging Station Map
map.description: Explore Polish charging stations by province, connector type, and minimum charging power.
map.setupRequiredMessage: Charging station map data is not available yet. Configure the database and run the EIPA import.
map.summary: Showing {shown} of {total} {total, plural, one {station} other {stations}} across {markers} {markers, plural, one {map marker} other {map markers}}.
map.limited: Results are capped at {limit}; narrow the filters for a more precise map.

client.stationsNearbyPopup: {count, plural, one {# station nearby} other {# stations nearby}}
client.markerTitleMultiple: {count, plural, one {# charging station} other {# charging stations}}
client.moreStationsInArea: {count, plural, one {+ # more station in this area} other {+ # more stations in this area}}
client.markersAfterGrouping: {count, plural, one {# map marker after nearby stations are grouped.} other {# map markers after nearby stations are grouped.}}
client.noStationsMatch: No stations match these map filters.

mapError.title: Map could not load
mapError.body: Charging station map data is temporarily unavailable. Try again, or check that the charging imports have completed.

connectors.title: Connector knowledge base
connectors.description: Static reference notes for interpreting connector names in imported charging station and vehicle data. These pages do not claim live compatibility or charger availability.

connectorDetail.incompleteDataBody: Some imported records do not include a connector type that can be classified confidently. This page keeps those records explainable without inventing compatibility, power, or regional support.
connectorDetail.imageCaption: Preview image only: the graphic above shows what this connector type looks like.

connectorDetailError.title: Connector details could not load
connectorDetailError.body: This static connector reference page is temporarily unavailable.

ccs2.description: CCS2 is the main European DC fast charging connector used by most modern EVs and high-power public chargers.

type2.description: Type 2 is the common European AC charging connector for destination charging, home wallboxes, and many public posts.

chademo.description: CHAdeMO is an older DC fast charging connector still found on some imported and legacy EVs.

unknown.description: The imported station record does not identify the connector type clearly enough to classify it.

insights.title: Charging Insights
insights.description: Aggregate health and coverage metrics from the charging station database.
insights.setupRequiredMessage: Charging insights are not available yet. Configure the database and run the charging station imports.
insights.emptyBody: Import EIPA or Open Charge Map station data to populate operator, connector, power, and province insights.
insights.connectorsMetricHelper: Individual plugs reported by station imports
insights.knownPowerMetricHelper: Connectors with a usable kW value
insights.connectorDistributionSubtitle: Connector types ranked by connector count.
insights.highestPowerSubtitle: Stations with the strongest reported connector.
insights.footnote: Highest power list considers connectors with known kW values; strongest connector per station is shown. Top observed connector power: {power}.

insightsError.title: Insights could not load
insightsError.body: Charging aggregate metrics are temporarily unavailable. Try again, or check that the charging imports have completed.
